title: Unlock PDF — Remove Password Offline
h1: Remove PDF Password Protection Instantly in Your Browser
description: Unlock password-protected PDFs locally if you know the password. 100% private. No upload. Perfect for users in Copenhagen.

sections.title: Why Unlock PDFs Locally?
sections.content: You have the password to your own file. Unlocking it should not require uploading sensitive documents to an external service.

sections.title: How to Unlock a Protected PDF

steps.title: Enter Your Password
steps.description: Provide the existing password — decryption stays in your browser.

steps.title: Download Unlocked PDF
steps.description: Get your unlocked, fully accessible PDF instantly.

sections.title: Instant PDF Unlocking for Copenhagen Users
sections.content: Users in Copenhagen access their own password-protected files without sending decryption keys to any server.

sections.title: Your Password Never Leaves the Browser
sections.content: The decryption key and your document are processed entirely in browser memory — never transmitted to any server or service.

sections.title: Instant Browser-Local Decryption
sections.content: AES decryption in your browser takes under a second — far faster than any cloud service with no upload wait.

faqs.q: Does it work without the password?
faqs.a: No, you must know the existing password to unlock.
Yes, permission restrictions are removed after password verification.
All decryption happens in your browser memory; nothing is transmitted.

faqs.q: What if the password is wrong?
faqs.a: You will see an error and can try again with the correct password.
